about.name: Jordan Latta
about.text: Games are a big part of my story - With over a decade of self-directed experience in Unity, I've been pursuing game development since the age of 7. I taught myself Unity and C# scripting in the summer of 2015 and fell in love.
about.hobbies: I'm always creating or tinkering with something, be it digital art, computer hardware, or pastry. I also love nature.
